free_text: Activation cross-sections of proton induced reactions
Al monitor and degrader foils of 98 um thickness were
used in the 65 MeV irradiation. The stack irradiated at
35 MeV contained Ti monitor foils and Al degraders.
Energy loss of the proton beam was calculated by
polynomial approximation of Andersen and Ziegler(1977).
Decay data were taken from NuDat2 library.
Independent and/or cumulative cross sections were
calculated from the well known activation formula
with measured activity, particle flux and number of
It was estimated from the uncertainty in
incident beam energy, the energy region subtended by
the foil thickness and straggling as the beam
traversed the stack. Initial uncertainty of the beam
energy was +-0.3MeV which reached max 1.5 MeV in the
No detailed error analysis was provided.
The experimental data were compared to the
results of the theoretical model codes ALICE-IPPE,
TALYS data were taken from TENDL2013 data library.
